taxonomy: Lomaridium simillimum belongs to the family Lomariopsidaceae, which is a group of ferns. This plant is a type of fern, specifically a member of the genus Lomaridium. The classification of Lomaridium simillimum further categorizes it as a species within the family Lomariopsidaceae. It is often found in tropical and subtropical regions, and its classification helps identify its unique characteristics and growth habits. Lomaridium simillimum is also known to be part of the order Polypodiales.
